steps.title: Spot the transition from general claim to supporting example
steps.content: The opening sentence makes a general counterclaim about industrial activity, and Consider at the start of the underlined portion signals that a specific example will now support this claim.

steps.title: Match the function to the correct choice
steps.content:
The matching choice identifies the function: the underlined portion introduces a specific example (the silver-studded blue butterfly) supporting the previous sentence's general claim.

The others misidentify the function by claiming it challenges the species itself, suggests future research, or provides a definition.

That matches B.
